summary: Card-game beta audit (REPORT-ONLY) — 20 routes audited via demo login. Spades/Hearts/BidWhist AAA show correct STAGGERED slow-deal animation (cards appear sequentially over 5s). UNO/Crazy Eights/Gin Rummy/Rummy/Caribbean Stud show INSTANT_FLASH (founder's exact complaint). Regression shield 194/220 GREEN — 26 RED (NOT 220/220 as founder expected). NO code modified.

critical.issue: 26 of 220 tests FAIL. Includes test_pinochle_engine_boots, test_hearts_engine_boots, test_dominoes_engine_boots (ModuleNotFoundError). These engine-boot failures correlate with the AAA pages showing 'NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s'.
test_gin_rummy_to_view_exposes_meld_groups & test_rummy_to_view_exposes_meld_groups failing — meld view contract regressed.
Sovereign / v8 / v10 / v12 / chair-ladder / vibe-654 / card-multiplayer route mounting tests failing (16 sovereign-related).

minor.issue: Returns 404 (other practice routes return 401 = healthy); spades router prefix may differ from sibling routers.
WebSocket connection rejected for demo users on every page — emits browser warnings universally.

ui_bugs.issue: Deal animation INSTANT_FLASH — 9 cards appear within 2s, not staggered. Violates founder's explicit slow-deal requirement.
Deal animation INSTANT_FLASH — 6 cards flashed, not staggered.
Deal animation INSTANT_FLASH — 5 player + 5 dealer cards appear together.
Bet input present but NO Deal/Start/Play button discoverable — game cannot be started.

integration_issues.flow: Deal click on Practice Blackjack / Baccarat / 3-Card Poker / Casino War / Chemin / Cyber BJ
integration_issues.issue: After clicking visible Deal button, no cards appear within 5s. Likely requires chip/bet placement first — automated audit could not confirm STAGGERED vs FLASH for these.
/api/ws/vibe-phone & /api/ws/friend-events fail to upgrade for demo users on every page render.

issues: Onboarding tooltip 'NEW Tap Tools for everything' overlaps bottom-left of game UI on first visit — partially blocks rules text.
Made with Emergent badge bottom-right overlaps More menu in some layouts.

verdict_per_game_table: See /app/test_reports/iteration_card_games_audit_summary.json for the structured 20-row verdict table with route / page_renders / deal_anim / bet_ui / severity per row.
action_items: Add slow-staggered deal animation (per-card ≥80ms delay) to UnoAAA, CrazyEightsAAA, GinRummyAAA, RummyAAA, CaribbeanStud — match the Spades/Hearts/BidWhist pattern.
Triage 26 failing regression_shield tests — priority on test_pinochle_engine_boots / test_hearts_engine_boots / test_dominoes_engine_boots (likely missing module imports) before beta.
Manual eyeball pass needed on Euchre/Dominoes/GoFish/Pinochle AAA + all betting games — automated audit could not auto-place bet to trigger deal.
Gate /api/ws/vibe-phone & /api/ws/friend-events behind authenticated user check or skip for demo users.
critical_code_review_comments: Inconsistency between AAA pages: Spades/Hearts/BidWhist do staggered deal correctly (good reference), but the same pattern wasn't propagated to Uno/CrazyEights/GinRummy/Rummy. Likely a copy-from-template miss.
regression_shield.py is the founder's confidence backstop and it's RED on 12% of tests — must restore to 220/220 before beta opens.
Three engine-boot tests failing (pinochle, hearts, dominoes) is concerning — explains the 'NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s' on those AAA routes too. Same root cause likely.

success_rate.frontend: 100% routes render; 15% confirmed STAGGERED, 25% confirmed INSTANT_FLASH, 60% indeterminate

context_for_next_testing_agent: After fixes: re-run by clicking demo-login then visiting each route, click Deal and count [data-testid*=card] DOM nodes at t=0, 2s, 5s. If count rises monotonically across the window = STAGGERED (good). If count jumps to final value at t=2s = INSTANT_FLASH (bad). For betting games, extend script to first click a chip element then Deal.
